name: 70.3 athlete, 2 weeks out — taper
description: Half-Ironman triathlete entering taper. Volume must drop sharply while intensity is preserved through short, race-pace work. Final week is very light.
must_have: Week 1 (2 weeks out): total volume reduced 40-50% from peak training
Week 2 (race week): total volume reduced 60-70% from peak, with race-day Saturday or Sunday
Short, sharp race-pace sessions preserved (e.g. 3-5×400m at race pace, or 4×5min at threshold)
Swim, bike, run all represented even in taper
Last 2-3 days before race are easy spin/jog or rest, no quality work
must_not_have: Long ride >2.5h within 10 days of race
Long run >90 min within 10 days of race
Any heavy lifting (>RPE 7) in either week
Quality intervals in the final 3 days before race
Increased weekly volume vs prior week (taper goes DOWN)
